departments.name: Engineering
departments.description: Roads, bridges, buildings, lakes, storm water drains, street lights, traffic engineering works

functions.scope: ward and arterial roads, bridges
lights, poles, LED conversion (BESCOM supplies power)
storm water drains only (sewerage by BWSSB)
lakes (~167 of 210)

departments.name: Revenue
departments.description: Property tax, khata, betterment charges, advertisement tax

functions.scope: SAS property tax, khata, transfer
trade licenses under KMC Act Schedule X

departments.name: Health and Sanitation
departments.description: Urban PHCs, vector control, food safety enforcement, births/deaths registration, public toilets

functions.scope: primary health, vector control, food safety
crematoria and burial grounds

departments.name: Animal Husbandry
departments.description: Stray dog ABC programme, cattle pounds, veterinary hospitals
departments.budget_note: No separate budget head — funded under Health & Sanitation

functions.scope: stray dogs, cattle, dog bites, animal carcasses

departments.name: Forest and Horticulture
departments.description: Parks, gardens, avenues, tree authority, urban forestry (IFS officers on deputation)

functions.scope: smaller parks, medians, avenues
trees (Tree Authority under Karnataka Preservation of Trees Act 1976)

departments.name: Administration
departments.description: General administration, HR, council support, pensions

departments.name: Finance
departments.budget_note: No separate budget head — funded under General Administration

departments.name: Solid Waste Management
departments.description: Door-to-door collection, transfer stations, processing plants, landfills (operated through BSWML SPV)

functions.scope: collection, segregation, processing, disposal

departments.name: Advertisement
departments.description: Hoarding regulation, advertisement tax collection, illegal hoarding removal
departments.budget_note: No separate budget head — funded under Revenue

functions.scope: outdoor advertising regulation

departments.name: Welfare
departments.description: DAY-NULM implementation, community organising, urban livelihoods

functions.scope: limited — most state-run by Karnataka Social Welfare Dept
DAY-NULM (centrally sponsored)

departments.name: Public Relations
departments.budget_note: No separate budget head — funded under General Administration

departments.name: Land Acquisition
departments.description: Land acquisition for road widening, public projects
departments.budget_note: No separate budget head — captured in project-specific allocations

departments.name: Town Planning
departments.description: Building plan sanction, occupancy certificates, deviation regulation (master planning by BDA)

functions.scope: building plans only — master plan by BDA

departments.name: Education
departments.description: Runs ~159 schools/colleges (academic control transferring to Karnataka Education Dept; corp retains buildings/infra)

functions.scope: limited — primary by Karnataka School Education Dept; pre-primary by Women & Child Dev (anganwadi)

external_entities.name: Bangalore Water Supply and Sewerage Board

functions.scope: entire water supply chain — Cauvery, treatment, distribution, billing
underground drainage / sewerage (storm water by corp)
all fire services in Bengaluru — corp has no fire function
Revised Master Plan (RMP 2031/2041), zoning, land-use
~33 lakes in BDA layouts
parks in BDA layouts (before handover to BBMP)
supplies power to street lights (assets owned by corp Engineering)
in-situ redevelopment, basic amenities in declared slums
air pollution monitoring (CAAQMS), industrial emissions
peripheral ring roads, elevated corridors (KRDCL); national highways (NHAI); state highways (PWD)
primary and secondary education (corp education being transferred to KSED)

external_entities.name: Karnataka Department of Women & Child Development

functions.scope: anganwadi / pre-primary (ICDS)
widow/disability/senior pensions
SC/ST welfare, BCM, minorities
lake regulation across all custodians
